textByHash.9880c54ebfcdf4cabd85adec94aa16d78752f425: I could be. Depends on who's asking? If you're with the Varrock City Guard, I had nothing to do with the robbery at the museum. I don't even know what I'd do with some Wizard robes.
textByHash.3eed096534b6a77081d9300607f86f2ee53b6d6c: Robbery? Sorry sir, first I've heard of a robbery.
textByHash.65822287d1cef64b19a91728c9bc89103a0551bf: Robbery? Sorry miss, first I've heard of a robbery.
textByHash.8c0e825098c279128a08d4f1c933ca012fd13c77: Willow? Hmm... I'm afraid I don't recall a Willow.
textByHash.f79fa0262cdb448e26d27820512eb257b069eba1: Nope, I'm sure. Only Willow I know of is a type of tree.
textByHash.95bd95d2bf900940699eb035514e0a871d039637: But, then again, my memory is a bit hazy, due to how hungry I am.
textByHash.1bfd6f8a6ddc78a032167181bad98aa21eb14ee8: Yep... been a while since I had a nice hot meal.
textByHash.a5110d67fc14193d6bf53d8d6c57d599101f56cd: Oh what a kind offer! I couldn't say no.
textByHash.f83e583ec24f4852288b294c58f2fc08e6dff832: Woah woah woah, hold your horses there friend! I can't just eat anything. I have very specific dietary requirements.
textByHash.c79757938b5e48b76ea9c1a567f480bd03a2bcd3: Don't be like that! I don't want nothing fancy, just a Steak sandwich from the Blue Moon Inn, in Varrock.
textByHash.8dd0029e8c3c709afbf394eaa75d4ee92fed47c9: Slight problem there, friend. I've been barred and the chef won't make me another one. Something about stealing from punters. I can't remember...
textByHash.bd62e140fbdd90e9df1c3e8518e3b77d8c5b4fb2: Of course! Oh, by the way, don't bother with the bartender. Just talk to the chef. Trust me.
textByHash.4b44a871d5b947abcc6252cd795322fbaa4a369d: Have you got the sandwich yet?
textByHash.0972931361f2005988568247119e596d84d73903: The Blue Moon Inn, in Varrock. They have the best cook around!
textByHash.959f0bd171c30dd5922d725dc13996eb434e2703: Ah, just in time for my afternoon snack. Pass it over.
textByHash.4ee33c0846f1bfbff7784b2e6fadca0fab882bc2: Aaah... not quite as good as the usual, but it hit the spot.
textByHash.00fa7a01020bad1a41907d07d80ce4a879bee3c7: Yes sir I am. I'll honour my side of the deal and head off to find Willow.
textByHash.f58016af13e26cc289ea56d2778b02b3a6f79e1b: Yes miss I am. I'll honour my side of the deal and head off to find Willow.
textByHash.8a777bf043224f06feeebc6c4ee7b40cbd77f3b3: Excellent! I'll be on my way then.
textByHash.db3ae84082377288cc54e4154af70fb9fb8adc31: Ah, my new favourite chef. Have you got another sandwich for me?
textByHash.2155e487ff10addca1be2e1918d495370184d72c: Woah! Alright there, calm down. Was only a joke.
textByHash.b7bde213713d3295b3836a17fdd6e0c0102e3583: You need to lighten up a little, my friend.
textByHash.eb6b1cc3d50146328c51a6361fcfe3a65f2347bb: Right, in I go. Wish me luck .
textByHash.3a826bcc10915b581d113369ef7418518580292f: Right, let's see what hidden surprises you have in store for me.
textByHash.3c933b709d8bd7ce52a10fa4cff89bb74f623216: Is that it? I thought this place would be better protected.
textByHash.f5a9f608ef807d03b47f2e17de8569a21b6580be: Alright guys! It's safe to come in! I think...
textByHash.0c6e04e96311f717f843d05836d9bd9da62bb9ee: I think we should get out of here, Willow!
textByHash.bdf6d1cf2d9ca211ce728d667dd29cc2a8419572: my old pal! How are you doing?
textByHash.7e77d58b0ee0a40416ffc23b6236249aa4673f2b: Not really. I'm not suited to such harsh climates. No steak sandwiches here either...
